comment: Add these fields inside the 'tools' object in your config.json
notes: rag_embed_base_url defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1 when omitted.
Embeddings use the same API key as your primary provider (providers[0].api_key).
sqlite-vec must be installed; see docs/setup/rag.md for installation instructions.
For local/compatible endpoints set rag_embed_base_url to your server, e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1
